use_cases: Display featured products on an e-commerce product listing page
Highlight premium offerings or services in a SaaS pricing section
Showcase creative work or portfolio items with interactive hover effects
Create engaging product grids with 3D perspective animations
ai_summary: An interactive product highlight card with 3D tilt effect and dynamic glow that follows mouse movement. Built with Framer Motion using spring physics for smooth rotation transforms. Features preserve-3d styling, gradient-based illumination, and responds to mouse position for immersive hover interactions on product displays.
